title: Phrasal Verbs Mastery — The Final Set for Native-Like Fluency
titleTr: Phrasal Verb Ustaligi — Anadili Gibi Akicilik Icin Son Set
description: Master the final set of advanced phrasal verbs that separate fluent speakers from native-level communicators. Navigate a high-stakes company crisis — product recall, media frenzy, and stakeholder panic — using precise, powerful phrasal verbs in every situation.
descriptionTr: Akici konusmacilari anadili seviyesinden ayiran ileri phrasal verb'lerin son setinde ustala. Yuksek riskli bir sirket krizini yonet — urun geri cagirma, medya cilginligi ve paydas panigi — her durumda kesin, guclu phrasal verb'ler kullanarak.

vocabulary.example: The government is clamping down on companies that violate safety regulations.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Hukumet guvenlik kurallarini ihlal eden sirketlere siki onlem aliyor.
vocabulary.extra: After the product recall, management clamped down on quality control procedures.
vocabulary.extraTr: Urun geri cagirmadan sonra yonetim kalite kontrol prosedurlerine siki onlem aldi.

vocabulary.example: Regulators are cracking down on misleading advertising in the tech sector.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Duzenleyiciler teknoloji sektorundeki yaniltici reklama sert tedbirler aliyor.
vocabulary.extra: Noun form: 'a crackdown' — The crackdown on unauthorized imports caused delays.
vocabulary.extraTr: Isim hali: 'a crackdown' — Yetkisiz ithalata yonelik sert tedbirler gecikmelere neden oldu.

vocabulary.example: It suddenly dawned on us that the defect wasn't isolated — it was systemic.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Birdenbire kusurun tekil olmadigini — sistemik oldugunu fark ettik.
vocabulary.extra: It dawned on the board that the crisis required immediate executive action.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yonetim kurulu krizin acil ust duzey eylem gerektirdiginin farkina vardi.

vocabulary.example: We need to do away with outdated testing procedures that miss critical defects.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kritik kusurlari kaciran eski test prosedurlerini kaldirmamiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Formal alternative: 'eliminate' or 'abolish' — The company did away with manual inspections.
vocabulary.extraTr: Resmi alternatif: 'eliminate' veya 'abolish' — Sirket elle yapilan denetimleri kaldirdi.

vocabulary.example: We didn't factor in the possibility of a supplier failure when planning production.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Uretim planlarken tedarikci basarisizligi olasiligini hesaba katmadik.
vocabulary.extra: Have you factored in the cost of the recall when calculating quarterly losses?
vocabulary.extraTr: Ceyrek zararlarini hesaplarken geri cagirma maliyetini hesaba kattiniz mi?

vocabulary.example: The PR team is struggling to fend off aggressive questions from investigative journalists.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Halkla iliskiler ekibi arastirmaci gazetecilerin agresif sorularini savusmakta zorlanIyor.
vocabulary.extra: We managed to fend off a hostile takeover attempt during the crisis.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kriz sirasinda dusmanca bir devralma girisimini savusturduk.

vocabulary.example: We need to flesh out the recall plan before presenting it to the board.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Geri cagirma planini yonetim kuruluna sunmadan once detaylandirmamiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Can you flesh out the timeline? The board wants specifics, not vague estimates.
vocabulary.extraTr: Zaman cizelgesini detaylandirir misin? Yonetim kurulu belirsiz tahminler degil, somut bilgiler istiyor.

vocabulary.example: The legal team hammered out a settlement agreement with the affected customers.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Hukuk ekibi etkilenen musterilerle bir uzlasma anlasmasi muzakere ederek sonuclandirdi.
vocabulary.extra: We spent 14 hours hammering out the details of the public statement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kamuoyu aciklamasinin detaylarini muzakere ederek sonuclandirmak icin 14 saat harcadik.

vocabulary.example: Let's hash out the root cause before we issue any public statement.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Herhangi bir kamuoyu aciklamasi yapmadan once temel nedeni enine boyuna tartisalim.
vocabulary.extra: The executives hashed out a crisis response strategy over a grueling weekend.
vocabulary.extraTr: Ust duzey yoneticiler yorucu bir hafta sonu boyunca bir kriz mudalale stratejisi tartistilar.

vocabulary.example: Investigators homed in on a faulty component in the battery assembly.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Mufettisler batarya montajindaki hatalI bir bilesene odaklandi.
vocabulary.extra: The media homed in on the CEO's reluctance to take personal responsibility.
vocabulary.extraTr: Medya CEO'nun kisisel sorumluluk almaktaki isteksizligine odaklandi.

vocabulary.example: After weeks of investigation, the team honed in on the exact manufacturing defect.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Haftalarca suren sorusturmanin ardindan ekip tam uretim kusurunu belirledi.
vocabulary.extra: Note: 'hone in on' is often used interchangeably with 'home in on,' though purists prefer 'home in on.'
vocabulary.extraTr: Not: 'hone in on' genellikle 'home in on' ile birbirinin yerine kullanilir, puristler 'home in on' tercih etse de.

vocabulary.example: The press latched onto the CEO's comment and turned it into a headline scandal.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Basin CEO'nun yorumuna yapisip onu manset skandaline donusturdu.
vocabulary.extra: Competitors latched onto our recall as proof that our products are unreliable.
vocabulary.extraTr: Rakipler geri cagirmamiza urunlerimizin guvenilmez oldugunu gostereni kanit olarak yapistilar.

vocabulary.example: I need to level with you — the recall will cost us at least $20 million.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Seninle durust olmam gerekiyor — geri cagirma bize en az 20 milyon dolara mal olacak.
vocabulary.extra: The CEO leveled with shareholders about the severity of the situation.
vocabulary.extraTr: CEO durumun ciddiyeti hakkinda hissedarlarla durust oldu.

vocabulary.example: The initial damage control strategy didn't pan out as we had hoped.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ilk hasar kontrol stratejisi umit ettigimiz gibi sonuclanmadi.
vocabulary.extra: Let's see how the public response pans out before making further statements.
vocabulary.extraTr: Daha fazla aciklama yapmadan once kamunun tepkisinin nasil gelisecegini gorelim.

vocabulary.turkish: yavas yavas azalmak / sona ermek / bitmek
vocabulary.example: Fortunately, the media attention petered out after two weeks of consistent messaging.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Neyse ki, iki haftalik tutarli mesajlasmanin ardindan medya ilgisi yavas yavas azaldi.
vocabulary.extra: Initial panic petered out once customers saw we were handling the recall transparently.
vocabulary.extraTr: Musteriler geri cagirmayi seffaf bir sekilde yonettigimizi gorunce ilk panik yavas yavas sona erdi.

vocabulary.example: Whatever you do, don't play down the severity of the defect to the media.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Ne yaparsan yap, kusurun ciddiyetini medyaya karsi onemsizlestirme.
vocabulary.extra: Playing down a safety issue can destroy public trust permanently.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bir guvenlik sorununu onemsizlestirmek kamusal guveni kalici olarak yikabilir.

vocabulary.example: We need to ramp up production of the replacement units immediately.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yedek birimlerin uretimini derhal hizlandirmamiz gerekiyor.
vocabulary.extra: Customer service ramped up operations to handle the flood of recall inquiries.
vocabulary.extraTr: Musteri hizmetleri geri cagirma sorularinin selini yonetmek icin operasyonlari yogunlastirdi.

vocabulary.example: The board asked the CEO to rein in spending until the recall costs are clear.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yonetim kurulu CEO'dan geri cagirma maliyetleri netlesene kadar harcamalari dizginlemesini istedi.
vocabulary.extra: We need to rein in the communications team — too many conflicting messages are going out.
vocabulary.extraTr: Iletisim ekibini kontrol altina almamiz gerekiyor — birbirine zit cok fazla mesaj cikiyor.

vocabulary.example: The investigation aims to root out the exact cause of the manufacturing defect.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sorusturma uretim kusurunun tam nedenini kokunden sokmek amacliyor.
vocabulary.extra: We must root out any negligence in the quality assurance department.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kalite guvence bolumundeki her turlu ihmali kokunden ortadan kaldirmaliyiz.

vocabulary.example: Engineers have ruled out software as the cause — the issue is purely hardware.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Muhendisler yazilimi neden olarak eledi — sorun tamamen donanim.
vocabulary.extra: We can't rule out the possibility of additional defective batches in the supply chain.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tedarik zincirinde ek kusurlu partiler olasiligini olasilik disi birakamayiz.

vocabulary.example: The CEO's transparent statement helped shore up investor confidence during the crisis.
vocabulary.exampleTr: CEO'nun seffaf aciklamasi kriz sirasinda yatirmci guvenini guclendirmeye yardimci oldu.
vocabulary.extra: We need to shore up our quality control processes to prevent future recalls.
vocabulary.extraTr: Gelecekteki geri cagirmalari onlemek icin kalite kontrol sureclerimizi saglamlastirmamiz gerekiyor.

vocabulary.example: Before the press conference, Eyup sized up the room to gauge the journalists' mood.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Basin toplantisından once Eyup gazetecilerin ruh halini olcmek icin odayi degerlendirdi.
vocabulary.extra: The board spent an hour sizing up the financial impact of the recall.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yonetim kurulu geri cagirmanin finansal etkisini degerlendirmek icin bir saat harcadi.

vocabulary.example: The head of PR tried to smooth over the situation with a carefully worded apology.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Halkla iliskiler baskani ozenle ifade edilmis bir ozurle durumu yatistirmaya calisti.
vocabulary.extra: You can't just smooth over a safety defect — you need full transparency.
vocabulary.extraTr: Bir guvenlik kusurunu sadece yatistiramazsin — tam seffafliga ihtiyacin var.

vocabulary.example: The company staked out its position early: full transparency and customer-first approach.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sirket pozisyonunu erken belirledi: tam seffaflik ve musteri oncelikli yaklasim.
vocabulary.extra: Journalists staked out the company headquarters waiting for the CEO's statement.
vocabulary.extraTr: Gazeteciler CEO'nun aciklamasini bekleyerek sirket merkezini gozledi.

vocabulary.turkish: geri cekilmek / gorevden ayrilmak / gerginligi azaltmak
vocabulary.example: The VP of Operations was asked to stand down pending the investigation results.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Operasyonlardan Sorumlu Baskan Yardimcisi'ndan sorusturma sonuclari beklenirken geri cekilmesi istendi.
vocabulary.extra: Once the crisis was resolved, the emergency response team stood down.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kriz cozulunce acil mudalale ekibi geri cekildi.

vocabulary.example: The defect stems from a change in the supplier's raw material composition.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Kusur tedarIkcinin hammadde bilesimindeki bir degisiklikten kaynaklaniyor.
vocabulary.extra: Most PR crises stem from delayed or dishonest communication.
vocabulary.extraTr: Cogu halkla iliskiler krizi geciken veya samimiyetsiz iletisimden kaynaklanir.

vocabulary.example: The CEO only touched on the recall briefly — he should have addressed it in detail.
vocabulary.exampleTr: CEO geri cagirmaya kisaca degindi — ayrintili olarak ele almaliydi.
vocabulary.extra: I want to touch on something the media hasn't mentioned yet: our compensation plan.
vocabulary.extraTr: Medyanin henuz bahsetmedigi bir seye deginmek istiyorum: tazminat planImiz.

vocabulary.example: Legal advised us to water down the apology, but I believe we should be direct.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Hukuk ozuru sulandirmamizi tavsiye etti ama bence dogrudan olmaliyiz.
vocabulary.extra: Don't water down the safety report — the board needs to see the full picture.
vocabulary.extraTr: Guvenlik raporunu sulandirma — yonetim kurulu tam resmi gormeli.

vocabulary.turkish: tam olarak odaklanmak / kesin hedef almak
vocabulary.example: Investigators zeroed in on Batch 47 as the source of the contamination.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Mufettisler kontaminasyonun kaynagi olarak Parti 47'ye tam olarak odaklandi.
vocabulary.extra: The media zeroed in on inconsistencies between the CEO's two public statements.
vocabulary.extraTr: Medya CEO'nun iki kamuoyu aciklamasi arasindaki tutarsizliklara tam olarak odaklandi.

vocabulary.example: We had to write off $8 million in defective inventory after the recall.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Geri cagirmadan sonra 8 milyon dolarlik kusurlu envanterin zarar yazilmasi gerekti.
vocabulary.extra: Noun form: 'a write-off' — The failed product line was a complete write-off.
vocabulary.extraTr: Isim hali: 'a write-off' — Basarisiz urun hatti tamamen zarar olarak yazildi.

grammar.title: Native-Level Phrasal Verb Usage
grammar.explanation: At C1 level, you don't just know phrasal verbs — you manipulate them like a native speaker. This means using them in passive voice, converting them into nouns, combining three-word forms, choosing between formal and informal registers, and knowing when NOT to use them. This is the difference between sounding fluent and sounding native.
grammar.explanationTr: C1 seviyesinde phrasal verb'leri sadece bilmezsin — anadili konusmaci gibi manipule edersin. Bu, onlari edilgen catida kullanmak, isimlere donusturmek, uc kelimelik formlar olusturmak, resmi ve resmi olmayan usluplar arasinda secim yapmak ve ne zaman KULLANMAMAK gerektigini bilmek demektir. Akici duymakla anadili gibi duymak arasindaki fark budur.
table: Formal Alternatives: Replace phrasal verbs in formal writing
Informal: 'root out corruption' → Formal: 'eradicate corruption'
Informal: 'ramp up production' → Formal: 'accelerate production'
In board reports use formal verbs; in team meetings phrasal verbs sound more natural.
Passive Forms: Phrasal verbs can be passivized
The defect was rooted out by the investigation team.
Spending has been reined in across all departments.
Passive phrasal verbs are common in news and reports: 'The issue was played down by the CEO.'
Noun Conversions: Many phrasal verbs become compound nouns
crack down → a crackdown / write off → a write-off / stand down → a standdown
ramp up → a ramp-up / shake up → a shakeup
Note hyphenation: usually hyphenated as nouns (a crack-down, a write-off), though spelling varies.
Three-Word Combinations: Phrasal verbs with prepositions
clamp down on (siki onlem almak) / home in on (odaklanmak)
crack down on (sert tedbirler almak) / zero in on (kesin hedef almak)
Three-word phrasal verbs always keep the preposition: 'They clamped down on fraud' NOT 'They clamped fraud down on.'
Register Shifting: Same meaning, different formality
Casual: 'Let's hash it out.' → Formal: 'Let's deliberate on the matter.'
Casual: 'It didn't pan out.' → Formal: 'It didn't materialize as expected.'
In a press conference, prefer formal. In a crisis war room with your team, phrasal verbs build urgency.
Separable vs. Inseparable: Know which phrasal verbs split
Separable: 'play the issue down' or 'play down the issue' — both correct
Inseparable: 'stem from' — NEVER 'stem the problem from'
Rule: if there's a direct object pronoun, separable verbs MUST split: 'play it down' NOT 'play down it.'
Collocations with Phrasal Verbs: Natural pairings
shore up + confidence / credibility / support / defenses
ramp up + production / efforts / pressure / security
Native speakers pair specific nouns with specific phrasal verbs. Learning these combos is key to fluency.

tips.en: In formal board reports, replace phrasal verbs: 'root out' → 'eradicate,' 'ramp up' → 'accelerate,' 'play down' → 'minimize,' 'do away with' → 'eliminate.' This is register awareness at C1.
tips.tr: Resmi yonetim kurulu raporlarinda phrasal verb'leri degistir: 'root out' → 'eradicate,' 'ramp up' → 'accelerate,' 'play down' → 'minimize,' 'do away with' → 'eliminate.' Bu C1 seviyesinde uslup farkindaligidir.

tips.en: Noun forms are everywhere in headlines: 'Government announces crackdown on tax evasion.' 'Company faces $8M write-off.' Learn the noun form of every phrasal verb you know.
tips.tr: Isim formları mansetlerde her yerde: 'Hukumet vergi kacakciligi konusunda sert tedbirler acikladi.' 'Sirket 8 milyon dolarlik zarar yazimiyla karsi karsiya.' Bildigin her phrasal verb'un isim formunu ogren.

tips.en: Pronoun rule for separable verbs: 'We played the issue down' ✓ 'We played down the issue' ✓ BUT 'We played it down' ✓ 'We played down it' ✗ — Pronouns MUST go in the middle.
tips.tr: Ayrilabilir fiillerde zamir kurali: 'We played the issue down' ✓ 'We played down the issue' ✓ AMA 'We played it down' ✓ 'We played down it' ✗ — Zamirler ortaya GITMELI.

tips.en: Three-word phrasal verbs (clamp down on, zero in on, home in on) are NEVER separable. The preposition stays glued: 'They zeroed in on the defect' — never 'They zeroed the defect in on.'
tips.tr: Uc kelimelik phrasal verb'ler (clamp down on, zero in on, home in on) ASLA ayrilmaz. Edat yapismis kalir: 'They zeroed in on the defect' — asla 'They zeroed the defect in on.'

tips.en: In crisis communication, phrasal verbs convey urgency and directness: 'We need to root out the problem NOW' hits harder than 'We need to eradicate the issue.' Use them strategically.
tips.tr: Kriz iletisiminde phrasal verb'ler aciliyet ve dogruluk iletir: 'Sorunu SIMDI kokunden sokmemiz gerekiyor' 'Sorunu ortadan kaldirmamiz gerekiyor'dan daha sert vurur. Onlari stratejik kullan.

tips.en: Passive phrasal verbs in news: 'Production has been ramped up.' 'The allegations were played down.' 'Irregular practices were rooted out.' Master this for reading BBC/CNN fluently.
tips.tr: Haberlerde edilgen phrasal verb'ler: 'Uretim hizlandirildi.' 'Iddialr onemsizlestirildi.' 'Duzensiz uygulamalar kokunden sokuldu.' BBC/CNN'i akici okumak icin buna hakim ol.

reading.text:
CRISIS AT NOVATECH: THE BATTERY RECALL THAT TESTED EVERYTHING

On a quiet Monday morning, the logistics division at NovaTech Solutions received three independent reports of overheating batteries in their flagship smart tracking device. By Tuesday, that number had climbed to seventeen. What followed was the most challenging two weeks in the company's history — and a masterclass in crisis management.

The investigation team zeroed in on the root cause within 48 hours: a faulty thermal adhesive supplied by a third-party vendor. The defect stemmed from a cost-cutting measure the vendor had implemented without notifying NovaTech. Engineers quickly ruled out software and firmware issues, confirming it was purely a hardware problem affecting Batches 42 through 51.

Eyup, the head of operations, knew they couldn't play down the severity. In an emergency board meeting, he leveled with the directors: 'We're looking at a full recall of 85,000 units. We need to write off approximately $12 million in inventory and ramp up production of replacement units simultaneously.' The board hammered out a three-phase response plan that same evening.

Phase one focused on consumer safety. NovaTech issued an immediate stop-sale order and launched a dedicated recall website within 24 hours. Phase two addressed stakeholder communication. Rather than water down the messaging, Eyup insisted on radical transparency: daily updates, an open hotline, and direct emails to every affected customer.

Phase three was the hardest — fending off the media storm. Journalists latched onto the story, and competitors tried to capitalize on the crisis. But NovaTech's consistent, honest communication gradually shored up public confidence. The initial media frenzy petered out after ten days.

The aftermath brought lasting changes. NovaTech clamped down on supplier quality standards, implemented triple-verification protocols, and did away with single-source component contracts entirely. The crisis cost $18 million in total, but the company's reputation emerged stronger than before. As Eyup told the board: 'This crisis didn't define us. Our response did.'
reading.textTr:
NOVATECH'TE KRIZ: HER SEYI TEST EDEN BATARYA GERI CAGIRMASI

Sessiz bir Pazartesi sabahi, NovaTech Solutions'in lojistik bolumu amiral gemisi akilli izleme cihazinda isi asan bataryalara dair uc bagimsiz rapor aldi. Sali gunu bu rakam on yediye cikmisti. Ardindan gelen sey sirketin tarihindeki en zorlu iki haftaydi — ve kriz yonetiminde bir ustalık dersi.

Sorusturma ekibi 48 saat icinde temel nedene odaklandi: ucuncu taraf bir satici tarafindan saglanan hatali bir termal yapistirici. Kusur, saticinin NovaTech'e haber vermeden uyguladigi bir maliyet dusurme onleminden kaynaklanyordu. Muhendisler hizla yazilim ve yazilim sorunlarini eledi ve Parti 42'den 51'e kadar etkilenen tamamen bir donanim sorunu oldugunu teyit etti.

Operasyon baskani Eyup, ciddiyeti onemsizlestiremeyeceklerini biliyordu. Acil yonetim kurulu toplantisinda yoneticilerle durust oldu: '85.000 birimin tam geri cagrilmasina bakiyoruz. Yaklasik 12 milyon dolarlik envanterin zarar yazilmasi ve ayni anda yedek birimlerin uretiminin hizlandirilmasi gerekiyor.' Yonetim kurulu ayni aksam uc asamali bir mudalale plani muzakere ederek sonuclandirdi.

Birinci asama tuketici guvenligine odaklandi. NovaTech derhal satis durdurma emri verdi ve 24 saat icinde ozel bir geri cagirma web sitesi baslatti. Ikinci asama paydas iletisimine yoneldi. Mesajlari sulandirmak yerine Eyup radikal seffaflikta israr etti: gunluk guncellemeler, acik hat ve etkilenen her musteriye dogrudan e-postalar.

Ucuncu asama en zoruydu — medya firtinasini savusmak. Gazeteciler hikayeye yapisti ve rakipler krizden faydalanmaya calisti. Ancak NovaTech'in tutarli, durustletisimi yvas yavas kamusal guveni guclendirdi. Ilk medya cilginligi on gun sonra yavas yavas azaldi.

Sonrasinda kalici degisiklikler geldi. NovaTech tedarikci kalite standartlarina siki onlem aldi, uclu dogrulama protokolleri uyguladı ve tek kaynakli bilesen sozlesmelerini tamamen kaldirdi. Kriz toplam 18 milyon dolara mal oldu ama sirketin itibari oncekinden daha guclu cikti. Eyup'un yonetim kuruluna soyledigi gibi: 'Bu kriz bizi tanimlamadi. Tepkimiz tanimladi.'

questions.question: What was the root cause of the battery defect?
options: A software bug in the firmware update
A faulty thermal adhesive from a third-party vendor
Incorrect battery specifications in the design

questions.question: How many units needed to be recalled?
What approach did Eyup insist on for stakeholder communication?
questions.questionTr: Eyup paydas iletisimi icin hangi yaklasimda israr etti?
options: Minimizing the scope of the problem
Delegating all communication to the PR agency
Waiting until the investigation was complete

questions.question: How long did the initial media frenzy last before it petered out?
questions.questionTr: Ilk medya cilginligi yavaslamadan once ne kadar surdu?

questions.question: What lasting change did NovaTech make regarding suppliers?
questions.questionTr: NovaTech tedarikci konusunda hangi kalici degisikligi yapti?
options: They eliminated single-source component contracts entirely
They reduced the number of products offered

fillBlanks.sentence: The investigation team ___ in on Batch 47 as the source of contamination.
fillBlanks.hint: Phrasal verb — tam olarak odaklanmak (zero in on)

fillBlanks.sentence: It suddenly ___ on us that the defect was systemic, not isolated.
The company had to ___ off $12 million in defective inventory.
We need to ___ up production of replacement units immediately.
The board spent hours ___ out the details of the public statement.
fillBlanks.hint: Phrasal verb — muzakere ederek sonuclandirmak (hammer out)

fillBlanks.sentence: Engineers ___ out software as the cause of the overheating.
fillBlanks.hint: Phrasal verb — olasilik disi birakmak (rule out)

fillBlanks.sentence: The CEO's transparent message helped ___ up investor confidence.
The press ___ onto the CEO's comment and turned it into a scandal.
The defect ___ from a cost-cutting measure by the vendor.
Media attention ___ out after two weeks of consistent messaging.
fillBlanks.hint: Phrasal verb — yavas yavas azalmak (peter out)

fillBlanks.sentence: We can't ___ down the severity of a safety defect.
The board asked management to ___ in spending until costs were clear.
I need to ___ with you — this recall will be extremely expensive.
NovaTech ___ down on supplier quality standards after the crisis.
fillBlanks.hint: Phrasal verb — siki onlem almak (clamp down on)

fillBlanks.sentence: We need to ___ out the recall plan before presenting it to the board.

multipleChoice.question: 'The government announced a ___ on tax evasion.' Dogru isim formu?
'We played ___ the issue to avoid panic.' Dogru tamamlama?
'The defect ___ from a supplier's cost-cutting measure.' Dogru fiil?
'We need to ___ the problem.' Which means 'completely eliminate'?
Which is the correct passive form? 'Production ___.'
'We played it down.' Why is 'it' in the middle?
options: Pronouns must go between separable phrasal verbs

multipleChoice.question: 'The PR team tried to ___ over the negative press.' Which phrasal verb?
'The $8 million loss was a complete ___.' Dogru isim formu?
'Let's ___ out the root cause before making a statement.' Hangisi dogru?
Which phrasal verb means 'gradually decrease and stop'?
'They ___ in on the exact manufacturing defect.' Hangisi dogru?
'Don't ___ down the report — the board needs the full picture.' Dogru fiil?

sentenceOrder.correct: The investigation team zeroed in on the root cause
We need to ramp up production of replacement units
The defect stemmed from a supplier's cost-cutting measure
Engineers quickly ruled out software as the cause
The media frenzy petered out after ten days
Don't play down the severity of the safety defect
The board hammered out a three-phase response plan
NovaTech clamped down on supplier quality standards
It suddenly dawned on us that the problem was systemic
The CEO's transparency helped shore up investor confidence

translation.turkish: Sorusturma ekibi sorunun temel nedenine tam olarak odaklandi.
translation.english: The investigation team zeroed in on the root cause of the problem.
acceptAlso: The investigation team honed in on the root cause of the problem

translation.turkish: Yedek birimlerin uretimini derhal hizlandirmamiz gerekiyor.
translation.english: We need to ramp up production of replacement units immediately.
acceptAlso: We must ramp up replacement unit production immediately

translation.turkish: Kusur tedarIkcinin maliyet dusurme onleminden kaynaklaniyor.
translation.english: The defect stems from a cost-cutting measure by the supplier.
acceptAlso: The defect stemmed from the supplier's cost-cutting measure

translation.turkish: Medya CEO'nun yorumuna yapisti ve manset skandalina donusdurdu.
translation.english: The media latched onto the CEO's comment and turned it into a headline scandal.
acceptAlso: The press latched onto the CEO's statement and made it a headline scandal

translation.english: Don't play down the severity of a safety defect.
acceptAlso: Never play down the severity of a safety defect

translation.turkish: Hukuk ekibi etkilenen musterilerle bir uzlasma muzakere ederek sonuclandirdi.
translation.english: The legal team hammered out a settlement with the affected customers.
acceptAlso: The legal team hammered out a settlement agreement with the affected customers

translation.turkish: Medya ilgisi iki hafta sonra yavas yavas azaldi.
translation.english: Media attention petered out after two weeks.
acceptAlso: The media attention gradually petered out after two weeks

translation.english: Engineers ruled out software as the cause.
acceptAlso: The engineers ruled out software as the cause of the issue

translation.turkish: Kusurlu envanterin 12 milyon dolarini zarar yazmak zorunda kaldik.
translation.english: We had to write off $12 million in defective inventory.
acceptAlso: We were forced to write off $12 million in defective inventory

translation.turkish: Seninle durust olmam gerekiyor — bu geri cagirma cok pahali olacak.
translation.english: I need to level with you — this recall will be very expensive.
acceptAlso: Let me level with you — this recall is going to be extremely expensive

dialog.title: Crisis Management at NovaTech — The Battery Recall
dialog.titleTr: NovaTech'te Kriz Yonetimi — Batarya Geri Cagirmasi
dialog.context: NovaTech'in amiral gemisi izleme cihazinda ciddi bir batarya kusuru tespit edildi. Eyup, operasyon baskani olarak krizi yonetiyor. Sahne 1: PR ekibi brifingu (Sarah, PR Muduru). Sahne 2: Medya aciklamasi hazirligi (David, Hukuk Danismani). Sahne 3: Yonetim Kurulu acil toplantisi (Ms. Chen, Yonetim Kurulu Baskani). Yuksek riskli, gercekci kriz senaryosu.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, we've got a serious problem. Seventeen overheating reports in 48 hours. Three tech blogs have already picked up the story, and Reuters is asking for a comment. We need to get ahead of this before it spirals.
lines.textTr: Eyup, ciddi bir sorunumuz var. 48 saatte on yedi isi asimi raporu. Uc teknoloji blogu haberi zaten alip ve Reuters yorum istiyor. Bu sarmala donmeden once oneune gecmemiz gerekiyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I know, Sarah. It dawned on me last night that this isn't an isolated incident — it's systemic. Engineering has zeroed in on a faulty thermal adhesive in Batches 42 through 51. That's 85,000 units in the field. We can't play this down.
lines.textTr: Biliyorum Sarah. Dun gece bunun tekil bir olay olmadigini — sistemik oldugunu fark ettim. Muhendislik Parti 42'den 51'e kadar hatali bir termal yapistiriciya odaklandi. Sahada 85.000 birim var. Bunu onemsizlestiremeyiz.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Agreed. But legal is pushing us to water down the public statement. They want us to say 'a small number of units may be affected' instead of disclosing the full scope. What's your call?
lines.textTr: Katiliyorum. Ama hukuk bizi kamuoyu aciklamasini sulandirmaya zorluyor. Tam kapsami aciklamak yerine 'az sayida birim etkilenmis olabilir' dememizi istiyorlar. Senin kararin ne?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: No. I need to level with you, Sarah — if we water down the message and the full numbers come out later, our credibility is destroyed. I've seen companies try to smooth over safety issues. It never pans out. We go full transparency. Every affected customer gets a direct email today.
lines.textTr: Hayir. Seninle durust olmam gerekiyor Sarah — mesaji sulandirirsak ve tam rakamlar sonra ortaya cikarsa, guvenilirligimiz yok olur. Sirketlerin guvenlik sorunlarini yatistirmaya calistigini gordum. Asla iyi sonuclanmaz. Tam seffafliga gidiyoruz. Etkilenen her musteri bugun dogrudan bir e-posta alacak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Understood. I'll ramp up the customer service team — we're going to be flooded with calls. Should I also flesh out a FAQ document for the call center agents?
lines.textTr: Anlasildi. Musteri hizmetleri ekibini yogunlastiracagim — aramalarla dolup tasacagiz. Cagri merkezi temsilcileri icin bir SSS belgesi de detaylandirmami ister misin?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Absolutely. Flesh it out with the technical details from engineering, but keep the language accessible. No jargon. And Sarah — we need to fend off any speculation. The message is clear: we identified the problem, we're recalling the units, and customer safety is our number one priority.
lines.textTr: Kesinlikle. Muhendislikteki teknik detaylarla detaylandir ama dili erisilebilir tut. Jargon yok. Ve Sarah — her turlu spekülasyonu savusmamiz gerekiyor. Mesaj net: sorunu tespit ettik, birimleri geri cagiriyoruz ve musteri guvenligi bir numarali oncelik.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, I understand your position on transparency, but I need to flag the litigation risk. If we admit full scope now, plaintiff attorneys will latch onto our statement in any class action suit. We need to factor in the legal exposure.
lines.textTr: Eyup, seffaflik konusundaki pozisyonunu anliyorum ama dava riskini isaretlemem gerekiyor. Simdi tam kapsami kabul edersek, davaci avukatlar herhangi bir toplu davada aciklamamiza yapisacak. Hukuki riski hesaba katmamiz gerekiyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: David, I hear you. But let's hash this out properly. If we're evasive now and the truth surfaces later, the litigation exposure doubles. Plus we lose public trust — and you can't put a dollar figure on that. I'm not saying we should be reckless with our words. I'm saying we should be honest.
lines.textTr: David, seni duyuyorum. Ama bunu durust bir sekilde enine boyuna tartisalim. Simdi kacamak yapip gercek sonra ortaya cikarsa, dava riski ikiye katlanir. Ayrica kamusal guveni kaybederiz — ve buna dolar degeri koyamazsin. Sozlerimizle pervasiz olmamizi soylemiyorum. Durust olmamizi soyleyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Fair point. Let me hammer out a statement that's transparent but legally defensible. I'll have it on your desk in two hours. But Eyüp — we also need to root out who in procurement approved this vendor's material change without proper testing.
lines.textTr: Hakli bir nokta. Seffaf ama hukuken savunulabilir bir aciklama muzakere edeyim. Iki saat icinde masanizda olur. Ama Eyup — tedarikteki kimin bu saticinin malzeme degisikligini uygun test olmadan onayladigini da kokunden bulmamiz gerekiyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Agreed. I've already asked internal audit to root out any negligence in the approval chain. But first things first — let's not get distracted. Consumer safety, then accountability. Now, I need to size up what we're walking into with the board.
lines.textTr: Katiliyorum. Ic denetimden onay zincirindeki herhangi bir ihmali kokunden sokmesini zaten istedim. Ama once onemli seyler — dikkatimizi dagitmayalim. Tuketici guvenligi, sonra hesap verebilirlik. Simdi, yonetim kuruluyla neye girdigimizi degerlendirmem gerekiyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Eyüp, thank you for calling this emergency session. I've read the preliminary report. I'll be direct — the board is concerned. Walk us through where we stand and what you're proposing.
lines.textTr: Eyup, bu acil oturumu topladigin icin tesekkurler. On raporu okudum. Dogrudan olacagim — yonetim kurulu endiseli. Nerede oldugmuzu ve ne onerdiginizi anlatun.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Ms. Chen, I'll level with you and the entire board. The situation is serious but containable. The defect stems from a third-party vendor's unauthorized material change. We've ruled out any internal design flaw. The scope is 85,000 units across Batches 42 to 51. We've already initiated a full recall.
lines.textTr: Bayan Chen, sizinle ve tum yonetim kuruluyla durust olacagim. Durum ciddi ama kontrol altina alinabilir. Kusur ucuncu taraf bir saticinin yetkisiz malzeme degisikliginden kaynaklaniyor. Herhangi bir dahili tasarim kusurunun olasIligini elemis bulunuyoruz. Kapsam Parti 42'den 51'e kadar 85.000 birim. Tam geri cagirmayi zaten baslattik.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: What's the financial impact? Don't sugarcoat it.
lines.textTr: Finansal etki ne? Tatlandirma.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: We're looking at approximately $12 million in inventory write-offs, plus $4 to $6 million in recall logistics, customer compensation, and ramped-up replacement production. I'd factor in an additional $2 million for legal contingencies. Total exposure: $18 to $20 million.
lines.textTr: Yaklasik 12 milyon dolarlik envanter zarari, arti 4 ila 6 milyon dolar geri cagirma lojistigi, musteri tazminati ve hizlandirlimiş yedek uretim goruyoruz. Hukuki acillar icin ek 2 milyon dolar dahil ederdim. Toplam risk: 18 ila 20 milyon dolar.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's significant. Some board members want to play down the scope publicly and handle this quietly. What's your position?
lines.textTr: Bu onemli. Bazi yonetim kurulu uyeleri kapsami kamuoyunda onemsizlestirmek ve bunu sessizce halletmek istiyor. Senin pozisyonun ne?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: With respect, Ms. Chen, I'd urge the board to rule out that approach entirely. If we play down the numbers and a journalist or regulator uncovers the full scope, the reputational damage will far exceed the recall cost. I've seen companies try to smooth over crises like this. It never pans out. The media will home in on any inconsistency.
lines.textTr: Saygilarimla Bayan Chen, yonetim kurulunu bu yaklasimi tamamen elemesini israrla tavsiye ederim. Rakamlari onemsizlestirirsek ve bir gazeteci veya duzenleyici tam kapsami ortaya cikarirsa, itibar zarari geri cagirma maliyetini cok asacaktir. Sirketlerin bunun gibi krizleri yatistirmaya calistigini gordum. Asla iyi sonuclanmaz. Medya her tutarsizliga odaklanacak.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: What about the VP of Operations who signed off on this vendor? Several board members are calling for him to stand down immediately.
lines.textTr: Bu saticiyi onaylayan Operasyon Baskan Yardimcisi ne olacak? Birkac yonetim kurulu uyesi derhal geri cekilmesini istiyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I understand the sentiment, but I'd recommend we don't make that decision until the internal investigation is complete. If we ask him to stand down now based on incomplete information, it could look reactive rather than principled. Let's root out the facts first, then hold the right people accountable.
lines.textTr: Duyguyu anliyorum ama ic sorusturma tamamlanana kadar bu karari vermememizi oneririm. Eksik bilgiye dayanarak simdi geri cekilmesini istersek, ilkeli degil tepkisel gorunebilir. Once gercekleri kokunden bulalim, sonra dogru kisile sorumlu tutalim.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Sound reasoning. Now, how do we shore up our reputation through this? The NovaTech brand has taken 15 years to build. I won't let one crisis undo that.
lines.textTr: Mantikli akil yurutme. Simdi, bu surec boyunca itibarimizi nasil guclendiririz? NovaTech markasinin insasi 15 yil surdu. Bir krizin bunu yok etmesine izin vermeyecegim.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Three actions, Ms. Chen. First, we clamp down on supplier quality — triple verification for all critical components, effective immediately. Second, we rein in any communications that aren't vetted by both legal and PR — one voice, one message. Third, we stake out our position clearly: NovaTech puts safety above profit. Period. If we do this right, the crisis becomes proof of our integrity, not a stain on our record.
lines.textTr: Uc eylem, Bayan Chen. Birincisi, tedarikci kalitesine siki onlem aliyoruz — tum kritik bilesenler icin uclu dogrulama, derhal yururluge giriyor. Ikincisi, hem hukuk hem de PR tarafindan kontrol edilmeyen her turlu iletisimi dizginliyoruz — tek ses, tek mesaj. Ucuncusu, pozisyonumuzu net belirliyoruz: NovaTech guvenlik kardan once gelir. Nokta. Bunu dogru yaparsak, kriz sicilmizdeki bir leke degil, butunlugumuzun kaniti olur.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I'm convinced. The board will back your plan. One last thing — I touched on this briefly in my email, but the Japanese distribution partner is nervous. Can you handle that call personally?
lines.textTr: Ikna oldum. Yonetim kurulu planini destekleyecek. Son bir sey — e-postamda kisaca degindim ama Japon dagitim ortagi gergin. O aramayi bizzat yonetebilir misin?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Already on my calendar for tomorrow morning. I'll level with them the same way I've leveled with you — full transparency, concrete action plan, and a commitment to do away with any process that allowed this to happen. This crisis won't define NovaTech. Our response will.
lines.textTr: Yarin sabah takvimimde zaten var. Sizinle durust oldugum gibi onlarla da durust olacagim — tam seffaflik, somut eylem plani ve bunun olmasina izin veren herhangi bir sureci kaldirma taahhdu. Bu kriz NovaTech'i tanimlamayacak. Tepkimiz tanimlayacak.

questions.question: Why did Eyup reject the legal team's suggestion to water down the public statement?
questions.questionTr: Eyup neden hukuk ekibinin kamuoyu aciklamasini sulandirma onerisini reddetti?
options: He wanted to blame the vendor publicly
He believed full transparency would protect credibility long-term
He wanted to cause panic among customers
Legal had no authority over communications

questions.question: What phrasal verb did David use when talking about finding who approved the vendor change?
questions.questionTr: David satici degisikligini kimin onayladigini bulmaktan bahsederken hangi phrasal verb'u kullandi?

questions.question: What was Eyup's position on asking the VP of Operations to stand down?
questions.questionTr: Operasyon Baskan Yardimcisi'ndan geri cekilmesini istemek konusunda Eyup'un pozisyonu neydi?
options: Wait until the internal investigation is complete

questions.question: What three actions did Eyup propose to shore up NovaTech's reputation?
questions.questionTr: Eyup NovaTech'in itibarini guclendirmek icin hangi uc eylemi onerdi?
options: Cut prices, increase ads, hire PR firm
Clamp down on supplier quality, rein in unvetted communications, stake out a clear safety-first position
Deny responsibility, blame vendor, minimize scope

questions.question: What was the total estimated financial exposure from the recall?
questions.questionTr: Geri cagirmadan tahmini toplam finansal risk ne kadar?
